product_overview: WaadCare is a backend platform for managing provider interactions, member eligibility, and visit-centric medical claims for insurance workflows. It provides authenticated REST APIs for login, provider catalogs and contract-driven services, claim submission with strict business rules, and eligibility/remaining-limit checks.
core_goals: Provide secure authentication and session management using JWT for all protected APIs.
Expose provider portal endpoints for medical taxonomy and contract-driven service pricing.
Support visit-centric claim submission and lifecycle while enforcing domain business rules (visitId mandatory, no manual pricing, category required).
Provide eligibility and remaining-limit checks to inform provider actions during visits.
Enforce architectural rules and produce clear error responses for business-rule violations to aid debugging and auditability.

features.name: Authentication Management
features.description: Authenticate users (providers, admins) using identifier (email/username) and password and return a JWT for subsequent requests.
user_flows: POST /api/v1/auth/login with valid identifier and password (JSON) -> Receive 200 with AuthResponse including JWT token
POST /api/v1/auth/login with invalid credentials -> Receive 401 Unauthorized
POST /api/v1/auth/login with JSON payload via curl but server defaults to x-www-form-urlencoded -> Receive 400 or login failure (debugging: server may misinterpret content-type)

features.name: Provider Portal Services
features.description: Allow authenticated providers to browse active medical categories and view services priced by their active contract (no manual price edits).
user_flows: POST /api/v1/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with AuthResponse including JWT token -> GET /api/provider/medical-categories with Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 with MedicalCategoryResponseDto[]

POST /api/v1/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with AuthResponse including JWT token -> GET /api/provider/my-contract/services with Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 with MedicalServiceResponseDto[] (pricing driven by provider contract)
GET /api/provider/medical-categories without Authorization header -> Receive 401 Unauthorized

GET /api/provider/my-contract/services with Authorization: Bearer <token> for a provider without an active contract -> Receive 200 with empty MedicalServiceResponseDto[] (no contract-driven services available)

features.name: Claims API (Visit-Centric)
features.description: Create and manage visit-centric medical claims; enforce mandatory visitId, disallow free-text services and manual pricing, and require valid medical category mapping.
user_flows: POST /api/v1/claims with Authorization: Bearer <token> and ClaimCreateDto body that includes valid visitId and categoryId -> Receive 200 with ClaimViewDto
POST /api/v1/claims with Authorization: Bearer <token> and ClaimCreateDto missing visitId -> Receive 400 Business Rule Exception (visitId is mandatory)

POST /api/v1/claims with Authorization: Bearer <token> and ClaimCreateDto containing a ClaimLine whose referenced medical service in DB lacks a category mapping and no categoryId provided -> Receive 400 Business Rule Exception (strict enforcement of categoryId in ClaimLine)

features.name: Eligibility & Policy API
features.description: Return member eligibility and remaining financial limits to support provider decisions during visit registration and claim preparation.
user_flows: GET /api/v1/eligibility/remaining-limit with Authorization: Bearer <token> and member identifier -> Receive 200 with FinancialSummaryDto
GET /api/v1/eligibility/remaining-limit with expired or invalid Authorization token -> Receive 401 Unauthorized

features.name: Authentication Management
features.description: Handles user login and session management using identifier (email/username) and password.

features.name: Provider Portal Services
features.description: Provides data for provider interactions including category listing and contract services.

endpoints.description: List medical services available under the provider's active contract

features.name: Claims API
features.description: Visit-centric claim creation and management with strict architectural rules.

endpoints.description: Create a new medical claim from a visit

features.name: Eligibility & Policy API
features.description: Checks member eligibility and remaining financial limits.

endpoints.description: Retrieve remaining financial limit for a member

known_limitations.issue: Strict enforcement of categoryId in ClaimLine
known_limitations.impact: Claim submission fails if the medical service in the DB lacks a pre-mapped category (fixed by prioritizing UI-sent category).

known_limitations.issue: Server defaults to x-www-form-urlencoded on some login failures
known_limitations.impact: Difficulty debugging JSON login payloads via curl.
